latest.prompt: the remote origin for this repo will be git@github.com:sql-ly/sqlly-datatable.git

history.prompt: In the repo i want the core code and a sample app.
i want to make this into a shared crate with an api so that it can be leveraged by other libs. the crate will be called sqlly-datatable

set sensable defaults then 
the grid should have the following externally setable features:
- select all key combination
- copy key combination
- copy with headers key combination
- alt menu modifier key
- page up key combination
- page down key combination
- decimal/integer formatting rules
    - show negative numbers in red
    - show negative numbers in parentheses if not then show the negative sign
    - specify number of decimal places
    - specify text alignment (left, center, right)
- date formatting rules
    - specify date format string
    - timezone offset
    - use natural language for relative dates (e.g., "2 days ago", "in 3 weeks")
        - required percision for natural language formatting (e.g., "2 days ago" vs "2 days and 3 hours ago")
        - format should respect the specified timezone offset
        - dd=day hh=hour vs h/d means only show h for hours and d for days, etc.
        - support second, minute, hour, day, week, month, year
    - specify text alignment (left, center, right)
- boolean
  - specify true/false text values
- strings
    - force case (upper, lower, title, none)
    - specify max length
    - specify truncation behavior (e.g., ellipsis, cut off, wrap)
    - specify text alignment (left, center, right)
- replacement rules for cell values
    - specify a list of replacement rules (e.g., replace "N/A" with "Not Available")
    - specify whether to apply replacement rules before or after formatting

each of these should be allowed to be set for all cells matching type as well as give a list of overrides by column index.
